title: Ornduffia reniformis
taxonomy: Ornduffia reniformis is a species of flowering plant in the family Alismataceae. It is native to the southwestern region of Western Australia. Ornduffia reniformis is classified as an annual or perennial herb, and its classification is further supported by its unique characteristics. The plant has been identified as a member of the genus Ornduffia, which is closely related to other aquatic plants. Ornduffia reniformis is also known to be a rare and endangered species in its native habitat.
